scripts.clean: clear && pnpx npkill -D -y && rm -rf pnpm-lock.yaml node_modules .examples && pnpm install
scripts.prerelease: pnpm run test:all && pnpm run release:check:versions
scripts.bump:patch: node scripts/bump-version.ts patch && pnpm run jsr:sync-version && node scripts/stamp-changelogs.ts
scripts.bump:minor: node scripts/bump-version.ts minor && pnpm run jsr:sync-version && node scripts/stamp-changelogs.ts
scripts.bump:major: node scripts/bump-version.ts major && pnpm run jsr:sync-version && node scripts/stamp-changelogs.ts
scripts.bump:alpha: node scripts/bump-version.ts prerelease alpha && pnpm run jsr:sync-version
scripts.bump:alpha:minor: node scripts/bump-version.ts prerelease alpha minor && pnpm run jsr:sync-version
scripts.bump:alpha:major: node scripts/bump-version.ts prerelease alpha major && pnpm run jsr:sync-version
scripts.bump:beta: node scripts/bump-version.ts prerelease beta && pnpm run jsr:sync-version
scripts.bump:beta:minor: node scripts/bump-version.ts prerelease beta minor && pnpm run jsr:sync-version
scripts.bump:beta:major: node scripts/bump-version.ts prerelease beta major && pnpm run jsr:sync-version
scripts.test:all: pnpm run test:vitest && pnpm run test:e2e
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run check:portability && pnpm --filter '*' run typecheck
